# Ma Pools Construction

> Director-led pool construction, renovation, equipment installation, and ongoing pool care for homes and businesses across Gauteng. Plus paving, tiling, ceiling work, plumbing, and garden services.

Ma Pools Construction is a Gauteng-based pool construction and care business led by founding director Mkhacani Amos Chauke. Operating from 331B Utekwane Street, Zone 7, Meadowlands (Soweto), the company services Soweto, Johannesburg, Roodepoort, Krugersdorp, and surrounding Gauteng suburbs. The business covers the full pool lifecycle, new builds, renovations, marblite and fiberglass finishing, plumbing, motor pump and timer installation, filter sand changes, jacuzzi installation and leak repair, fish ponds, and pool covers, alongside complementary services such as paving, floor tiles, ceiling installation, house and office plumbing, and garden services. Quotes are free and arranged by WhatsApp, phone, or the booking form.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/): Business overview, headline services, and entry to a free quote.
- [Services](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/services.html): Complete catalogue of pool construction, equipment, repair, jacuzzi, paving, tiling, ceiling, plumbing, and garden services.
- [Gallery](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/gallery.html): Photographs of pools and projects (placeholder imagery currently, being replaced with real project photography).
- [Testimonials](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/testimonials.html): Customer feedback page, verified reviews collected on this page as customers submit them.
- [Book a Consultation](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/book.html): Free quote request form for any pool, plumbing, paving, or garden job.
- [About](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/about.html): Director profile, contact information, and company background.

## Services

### Pool Construction & Renovation
- New pool construction
- Pool renovations
- Marblite finishing
- Fiberglass installation
- Pool covers, supply and installation
- Fish pond construction

### Pool Equipment & Plumbing
- Pool heating systems
- Pool plumbing installation
- Motor pump installation
- Pool pump repair
- Filter sand replacement
- Timer installation

### Jacuzzi & Pool Care
- Jacuzzi installation
- Jacuzzi leak repair
- Pool services and regular maintenance

### Beyond the Pool
- Paving
- Floor tiles
- Ceiling installation
- House plumbing
- Office plumbing
- Garden services

## Service Areas

Ma Pools Construction services Gauteng province, with primary coverage of:

- Soweto (Meadowlands, Diepkloof, Orlando, Pimville, Dobsonville, Naledi, Protea Glen)
- Johannesburg
- Roodepoort
- Krugersdorp
- Lenasia and Eldorado Park
- Florida and surrounding West Rand suburbs

- Director: Mkhacani Amos Chauke
